TextENGNew: Special lecture: ``Regarding the Solution to Psychopathology in Modern Times.``

On Wednesday, December 22nd at 4:40 PM, the special lecture ``Regarding the Solution to Psychopathology in Modern Times`` will be held in the Saeki General Hospital Building A, in the Grand Hall on the fifth floor.
The conflicts in human relationships arising from lack of communication, and in response to sudden changes in environment, will continue to be explored.
Alleviating the stress accumulated under those circumstances is a complex problem that can't be resolved with mere rest and relaxation.

Mr. Chiba, who has been contributing to the advancement of psychopathology both domestically and abroad for many years as part of the Ministry of Health and Welfare's health policy bureau, will introduce the latest innovations in medication to address these problems.
Furthermore, he is the author of ``The Value of Medication in Psychopathology`` (via Okinomiya Publishing), which was released last April.
■ Date and time: Wednesday, December 22nd, 4:40 PM ~ 5:40 PM.
■ Location: Saeki General Hospital, Building A. 5th floor, Grand Hall
■ Topic: ``Regarding the Solution to Psychopathology in Modern Times.``
■ Presenter: Akihiko Chiba (Minister of Health and Welfare).
■ Sponsor: Chubu Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Sales Association.
■ Participation requirements: Please come directly on the specified day. No advance application required. (Please leave a business card at the reception table.)
■ For more information: Contact the secretary of the Chubu Pharmaceutical Manufacturing and Sales Association.
*Since this lecture is intended for university patrons and staff, media coverage is prohibited.
